name: coding-plugins
description: Chinese-first workflow-only plugin with English agent-facing skills and Change Capsules.

interface.shortDescription: Workflow-only coding guidance with risk-scaled Change Capsules.
interface.longDescription: Coding Plugins 2.0 is a workflow-only skill collection. It routes work by risk, uses Change Capsules only when durable context is needed, and keeps TDD, debugging, review, verification, commit, and branch-finishing discipline without a plugin runtime.
defaultPrompt: I have an idea; help me compare options before deciding whether to build it.
I want to implement a feature; choose the smallest safe workflow profile.
Help me fix this with a test-driven workflow.
Check whether this change is ready to finish.
